text: V CREATE DIGITAL PRESENTS....
Display a solid light blue background.
Being A Kid Again....
Reveal a square piece of paper centered on a wooden surface.
"Turn the square paper 45 degrees to make a diamond."
original_texts: Rotate the square paper 45 degrees to form a diamond shape.

text: Fold paper diagonally, smooth, unfold.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Smooth out the crease along the diagonal fold.
Unfold the paper to reveal the initial crease.

text: Fold the square paper diagonally, colored side down, smooth the crease, then align the top point with the bottom edge.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Smooth out the fold by running fingers along the edge to create a sharp crease.
Align the top point of the triangle with the bottom edge, creating a smaller triangle at the top.

text: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Fold the square paper diagonally into a triangle, aligning the edges perfectly. Smooth the crease, then unfold to reveal the diagonal line.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the edges align perfectly.
Smooth out the crease along the diagonal fold.
Unfold the paper to reveal the diagonal crease.

text: Fold the square paper diagonally, colored side down, smooth the crease, then unfold.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Smooth out the crease along the diagonal fold.
Unfold the paper to reveal the diagonal crease.

text: Fold square paper diagonally, color down, crease, unfold.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Smooth out the crease along the diagonal fold.
Unfold the paper to reveal the diagonal crease.

text: Fold square paper diagonally, colored side down.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Smooth out the crease along the diagonal fold.

text: Fold the square paper diagonally into a perfect triangle, aligning the edges precisely.
original_texts: Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the edges align perfectly.

text: Smooth the diagonal crease for precision, then unfold and fold each corner to the center, forming smaller triangles.
original_texts: Smooth out the crease along the diagonal fold for precision.
Unfold the paper and then fold each corner towards the center crease, creating smaller triangles.

text: Aligns the top paper edge with the center crease, forming a small top triangle, then folds the bottom corners up to meet the new triangle's sides.
original_texts: Aligns the top edge of the paper with the center crease, creating a smaller triangle at the top.
Folds the bottom corners upwards to meet the sides of the newly formed triangle.

text: Flips the paper, repeats the corner folds on the opposite side, and makes precise creases along all edges for sharp definition.
original_texts: Flips the paper over and repeats the corner folds on the opposite side.
Makes precise creases along all folded edges to ensure sharp definition.

text: Fold the paper along the existing crease, aligning the top edge with the bottom edge.
Smooth out the fold to create a sharp crease across the paper.
Aligns paper with a vertical crease, draws two dots for eyes, then adds a curved line below for a mouth.
original_texts: Aligns the paper with a vertical crease and draws two dots for eyes.
Draws a curved line below the dots to form a mouth.

text: Adds small dots above the mouth for whiskers, then completes the dog's face on the origami.
original_texts: Adds small dots above the mouth to represent whiskers.
Completes the drawing of the dog's face on the origami.

text: Rotate the origami dog face to show its front, then place it flat on the table. Lift it slightly, then set it back down.
original_texts: Rotate the origami dog face to display its front view.
Position the origami dog face flat on the table.
Lift the origami dog face slightly off the table.
Place the origami dog face back down on the table.
